scope: Paging notifications report violations from proof.json.not_delivered (the same source of truth as S02/S04's fixes) instead of regex-scraping proof.md; internal/ears's lint-time EARS classification and cmd/sworn/ledger.go's acceptance-check counts read spec.json instead of independently re-deriving from spec.md text.

test_results.output: ok  	github.com/swornagent/sworn/internal/run	5.098s (includes TestRunSlice_FailNotifiesOnce, the run_test.go call site the design flagged as a risk)

all 39 test packages ok, 0 failures (internal/baton/schemas and internal/verdict have no test files); grep for the newline-eating-edit corruption pattern across all changed .go files found no fused code (2 hits, both legitimate comment prose)

test_results.command: gofmt -l internal/account/notify.go internal/account/notify_test.go internal/ears/ears.go internal/ears/ears_test.go cmd/sworn/ledger.go cmd/sworn/ledger_test.go internal/run/slice.go

reachability_artifacts: docs/release/2026-07-01-render-drift-reconciliation/S07-remaining-rescrape-cleanup/reachability-lint-ac-output.txt — captured live `sworn lint ac 2026-07-01-render-drift-reconciliation` output: exit 0, 43/43 acceptance checks well-formed EARS across all 7 slices, 0 violations. This is AC-02's own reachability text (the Captain review's pin 1 named exactly this command as the required artefact) turned into a live command run — it was exit 2 before this slice on this spec.json-only release.
delivered: AC-01: ViolationsSummary(sliceDir string, violationCount int) reads sliceDir/proof.json.not_delivered directly, no proof.md read remains, mirroring internal/mcp/context.go's readProofViolations (S04); evidence: internal/account/notify.go, TestViolationsSummary_FromFile (incl. a decoy proof.md-must-be-ignored case), TestViolationsSummary_Truncation, TestViolationsSummary_MalformedProofJSONFallsBack; call site internal/run/slice.go:865 updated from proofPath to absSliceDir; TestRunSlice_FailNotifiesOnce (internal/run) still passes through the same integration point.

AC-02: internal/ears.Validate reads the pre-computed ears_keyword field from spec.json via a new patternFromKeyword/classifySpecJSON, instead of re-classifying spec.md prose text; the eager spec.md read that made sworn lint ac exit 2 on this spec.json-only release is now only reached in the legacy fallback branch (spec.json absent/empty); evidence: internal/ears/ears.go, TestValidate_ReadsEARSKeywordFromSpecJSON, and the live reachability artefact (sworn lint ac exits 0).

AC-03: cmd/sworn/ledger.go's countGates derives sliceDir explicitly and uses len(spec.json.acceptance_criteria) via internal/spec.ReadRecord, falling back to the existing `- [ ]`-line spec.md scan only when spec.json is absent; evidence: cmd/sworn/ledger.go, TestSync_GateCountFromSpecJSON (through the cmdLedgerSync integration point), TestSync_GateCountFromSpec (unchanged legacy fixture still passes).

AC-04: JSON is authoritative on disagreement for both AC-02 and AC-03 — satisfied by construction (no historical spec.md/spec.json/proof.md/proof.json file is touched, only which source future reads prefer) and additionally proven for AC-02 by TestValidate_SpecJSONWinsOverDisagreeingSpecMd, which constructs a slice where spec.md text would classify PatternNone (a violation) and spec.json says 'When' (event-driven), and asserts spec.json wins.
AC-05: go build ./... exit 0; go test ./internal/account/... ./internal/ears/... ./cmd/sworn/... pass; evidence: test_results above.
divergence: Design-review pin 2 (spec.ReadRecord's (nil,nil) 'absent' vs (nil,err) 'malformed' must not be conflated) required a signature change to cmd/sworn/ledger.go's countGates — int became (int, error) — and a corresponding change to its sole caller cmdLedgerSync (same file, already a declared touchpoint) to treat a ReadRecord error as a sync error rather than silently returning gate count 0. This is a slightly larger change than design.md's literal 'non-nil record with len>0, else fall back' wording, driven directly by the Captain's pin. Covered by TestSync_MalformedSpecJSONFailsClosed. internal/ears.Validate's existing (*Report, error) signature already supported propagating the equivalent error with no signature change.

sworn llm-check --type ac-satisfaction was not run in the implementer session (no SWORN_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY available); the fresh-context /verify-slice pass is the model-backed check for this slice, consistent with the sibling S04/S06 slices. Rule 2 deferral recorded in journal.md.

The deterministic release-verify.sh first-pass script FAILs 'spec.md missing' on this slice — a known false negative for spec.json-only (spec-v1) slices on this release (feedback_releaseverify_specmd_false_fail); no spec.md was manufactured to satisfy it, per the design-review pin. The canonical gate is the model-backed sworn verify / fresh /verify-slice.
